vocab.example: 这个问题没有标准答案。
我喜欢在周末参加户外活动。
我们不要轻易伤害别人的感情。
他目不转睛地盯着书本。
他代表学校参加了比赛。
她不仅聪明，而且非常勤奋。
早睡早起是一个好习惯。
听音乐可以让我感到放松。
每隔一小时，我们就休息一下。
他把烦恼都抛到脑后了。

sentences.text: 小月吓得浑身发抖，直冒冷汗。
sentences.description: Scared girl, shivering with cold sweat.

sentences.text: 小安坐在电脑前，目不转睛地盯着屏幕。
sentences.description: A boy staring intently at the computer screen.

sentences.text: 我急得像热锅上的蚂蚁，心里七上八下的。
sentences.description: Anxious like an ant on a hot pan.

sentences.text: 在好奇心的驱使下，我向着烟味的方向走去。
sentences.description: Driven by curiosity, walking towards the smoke.

sentences.text: 因为睡眠不足，他整天无精打采，身体也变差了。
sentences.description: Listless and tired due to lack of sleep.

答案.zh: 我终于找到了这道题的正确答案。
答案.en: I finally found the correct answer to this problem.

答案.zh: 请把你的答案写在答题纸上。
答案.en: Please write your answer on the answer sheet.

答案.zh: 老师公布了昨天的测验答案。
答案.en: The teacher announced the answers to yesterday's test.

答案.zh: 这个问题没有唯一的答案。
答案.en: There is no single answer to this question.

答案.zh: 经过认真思考，他得出了答案。
答案.en: After careful thought, he arrived at the answer.

户外.zh: 多参加户外运动对身体有好处。
户外.en: Participating more in outdoor sports is good for one's health.

户外.zh: 今天天气晴朗，适合去户外郊游。
户外.en: The weather is sunny today, suitable for an outdoor outing.

户外.zh: 户外活动能让我们接触大自然。
户外.en: Outdoor activities allow us to get in touch with nature.

户外.zh: 请在户外空旷的地方放风筝。
户外.en: Please fly kites in open outdoor spaces.

户外.zh: 他们举办了一场热闹的户外音乐会。
户外.en: They organized a lively outdoor concert.

伤害.zh: 我们不能做出伤害别人的事情。
伤害.en: We must not do things that harm others.

伤害.zh: 强烈的阳光会伤害眼睛。
伤害.en: Intense sunlight will damage the eyes.

伤害.zh: 他的言语伤害了朋友的感情。
伤害.en: His words hurt his friend's feelings.

伤害.zh: 学会自我保护，避免受到伤害。
伤害.en: Learn self-protection to avoid being hurt.

伤害.zh: 乱扔垃圾会严重伤害自然环境。
伤害.en: Littering will severely harm the natural environment.

盯.zh: 不要一直盯着屏幕看，注意休息。
盯.en: Don't keep staring at the screen; make sure to rest.

盯.zh: 小猫正死死地盯着老鼠。
盯.en: The kitten is staring intently at the mouse.

盯.zh: 他盯着地图看了好久，寻找路线。
盯.en: He stared at the map for a long time, looking for the route.

盯.zh: 被陌生人盯着看会让人觉得不舒服。
盯.en: Being stared at by a stranger makes one feel uncomfortable.

盯.zh: 老师盯着黑板上的算式认真检查。
盯.en: The teacher stared at the equation on the blackboard, checking it carefully.

代表.zh: 他代表全班同学在台上发言。
代表.en: He represents the entire class speaking on stage.

代表.zh: 红色的心形符号代表爱心。
代表.en: The red heart symbol represents love.

代表.zh: 每一个代表都提出了宝贵的建议。
这项荣誉代表了大家共同的努力。
代表.en: This honor represents everyone's joint efforts.

代表.zh: 班长作为学生代表去参加了会议。
代表.en: The class monitor attended the meeting as the student representative.

而且.zh: 他不仅聪明，而且非常勤奋。
而且.en: He is not only smart, but also very diligent.

而且.zh: 这件衣服款式好看，而且价格便宜。
而且.en: This piece of clothing looks nice and is also cheap.

而且.zh: 外面下着大雨，而且还刮起了大风。
而且.en: It is raining heavily outside, and moreover, strong winds have blown up.

而且.zh: 这本书很有趣，而且能学到知识。
而且.en: This book is very interesting, and you can also learn knowledge from it.

而且.zh: 他按时完成了作业，而且字写得很好。
而且.en: He completed his homework on time, and moreover, his handwriting is very good.

习惯.zh: 养成早睡早起的好习惯很重要。
习惯.en: Developing the good habit of sleeping early and rising early is very important.

习惯.zh: 我已经习惯了这里的日常生活。
习惯.en: I have already gotten used to daily life here.

习惯.zh: 改掉不良习惯需要持之以恒的努力。
习惯.en: Breaking bad habits requires persistent effort.

习惯.zh: 饭后散步是爷爷多年来的习惯。
习惯.en: Taking a walk after meals has been Grandpa's habit for many years.

习惯.zh: 他慢慢习惯了新学校的环境。
习惯.en: He gradually got used to the new school's environment.

正确.zh: 请用正确的姿势书写和阅读。
正确.en: Please use the correct posture for writing and reading.

正确.zh: 他的回答完全正确，得到了老师的称赞。
正确.en: His answer was completely correct and won praise from the teacher.

正确.zh: 做出正确的选择需要冷静思考。
正确.en: Making the correct choice requires calm thinking.

正确.zh: 只有通过正确的方法才能解决问题。
正确.en: Only through correct methods can problems be solved.

正确.zh: 请确认输入了正确的密码。
正确.en: Please confirm that you have entered the correct password.

昏暗.zh: 在昏暗的光线下看书对眼睛不好。
昏暗.en: Reading books under dim light is bad for the eyes.

昏暗.zh: 房间里十分昏暗，需要打开灯。
昏暗.en: The room is very dim and needs the lights turned on.

昏暗.zh: 太阳落山了，四周渐渐昏暗下来。
昏暗.en: The sun set, and surroundings gradually grew dim.

昏暗.zh: 昏暗的街灯照射着空无一人的马路。
昏暗.en: Dim streetlights illuminated the empty road.

昏暗.zh: 他们走进了昏暗的山洞里。
昏暗.en: They walked into the dim cave.

放松.zh: 考试结束后，大家终于可以放松一下了。
放松.en: After the exam ended, everyone could finally relax a bit.

放松.zh: 听音乐是放松心情的好办法。
放松.en: Listening to music is a good way to relax your mind.

放松.zh: 做深呼吸可以帮助身体放松。
放松.en: Taking deep breaths can help the body relax.

放松.zh: 学习时不能放松对自己的要求。
放松.en: One shouldn't relax standards for oneself while studying.

放松.zh: 周末去公园散步让人感到无比放松。
放松.en: Walking in the park on weekends makes one feel exceptionally relaxed.

每隔.zh: 每隔两小时，我们就要休息十分钟。
每隔.en: Every two hours, we take a ten-minute break.

每隔.zh: 这里的公交车每隔一趟车需要等很久。
每隔.en: The buses here require a long wait between every run.

每隔.zh: 道路两旁每隔几米就有一棵树。
每隔.en: There is a tree every few meters on both sides of the road.

每隔.zh: 请每隔一段时间清理一下垃圾。
每隔.en: Please clean up the trash every once in a while.

每隔.zh: 闹钟每隔五分钟就会响一次。
每隔.en: The alarm clock rings every five minutes.

下降.zh: 近期的气温开始明显下降。
下降.en: Temperatures recently have begun to drop noticeably.

下降.zh: 长期看手机会导致视力下降。
下降.en: Looking at mobile phones long-term will lead to declining eyesight.

下降.zh: 飞机正在缓缓下降，准备降落。
下降.en: The airplane is gradually descending, preparing to land.

下降.zh: 不努力学习会导致成绩下降。
下降.en: Not studying hard will lead to a drop in grades.

下降.zh: 商品的价格在节后有所下降。
下降.en: Prices of goods dropped somewhat after the holiday.

电脑.zh: 我用电脑来查阅学习资料。
电脑.en: I use a computer to look up study materials.

电脑.zh: 不要长时间坐在电脑面前。
电脑.en: Do not sit in front of the computer for a long time.

电脑.zh: 这台电脑的处理速度非常快。
电脑.en: This computer's processing speed is extremely fast.

电脑.zh: 哥哥正在电脑上编写程序。
电脑.en: My elder brother is writing programs on the computer.

电脑.zh: 现代人的工作离不开电脑。
电脑.en: Modern people's work cannot do without computers.

眼圈.zh: 昨晚没睡好，今天他的眼圈黑黑的。
眼圈.en: He didn't sleep well last night, so today his eye circles are dark.

眼圈.zh: 听到坏消息，她的眼圈一下子红了。
眼圈.en: Upon hearing the bad news, the rims of her eyes reddened instantly.

眼圈.zh: 大熊猫有标志性的黑眼圈。
眼圈.en: Giant pandas have iconic dark eye circles.

眼圈.zh: 哭过之后，她的眼圈显得有些红肿。
眼圈.en: After crying, the areas around her eyes appeared somewhat red and swollen.

眼圈.zh: 长期熬夜会让眼圈颜色变深。
眼圈.en: Staying up late long-term will darken one's eye circles.

模糊.zh: 不戴眼镜时，我看远处的字很模糊。
模糊.en: Without glasses, the characters I see in the distance are blurry.

模糊.zh: 玻璃上蒙了一层水汽，视线变得模糊。
模糊.en: Water vapor gathered on the glass, making line of sight blurry.

模糊.zh: 对很久以前的事，我的记忆已经模糊了。
模糊.en: For things from long ago, my memories have become vague.

模糊.zh: 雨水打湿了字迹，上面的文字模糊不清。
模糊.en: Rain soaked the handwriting, leaving the text on it blurry and unclear.

模糊.zh: 天色暗了，轮廓开始模糊起来。
模糊.en: The sky darkened, and outlines began to grow fuzzy.

抛到脑后.zh: 玩耍时，他把作业完全抛到脑后了。
抛到脑后.en: While playing, he completely threw his homework to the back of his mind.

抛到脑后.zh: 我们要把烦恼抛到脑后，快乐生活。
抛到脑后.en: We should cast our worries behind us and live happily.

抛到脑后.zh: 一遇到好吃的，他就把减肥的计划抛到脑后。
抛到脑后.en: Whenever he encounters tasty food, he casts his weight-loss plan to the wind.

抛到脑后.zh: 老师的叮嘱全被他抛到脑后去了。
抛到脑后.en: The teacher's instructions were entirely put out of his mind by him.

抛到脑后.zh: 面对危机，他把个人安全抛到脑后。
抛到脑后.en: Facing crisis, he put his personal safety out of his mind.

保持.zh: 上课时要保持安静，认真听讲。
保持.en: Keep quiet during class and listen attentively.

保持.zh: 请保持室内的卫生和整洁。
保持.en: Please maintain indoor hygiene and neatness.

保持.zh: 运动员在比赛中保持着良好的状态。
保持.en: The athlete maintained a good condition during the competition.

保持.zh: 看书时眼睛与书本要保持适当距离。
保持.en: When reading, maintain an appropriate distance between eyes and books.

保持.zh: 遇到急事时要保持冷静。
保持.en: Maintain calm when encountering urgent matters.

距离.zh: 学校距离我家只有一公里。
距离.en: The school is only one kilometer away from my home.

距离.zh: 保持安全距离可以避免碰撞。
距离.en: Keeping a safe distance can prevent collisions.

距离.zh: 距离考试还有最后三天时间。
距离.en: There are still three final days left before the exam.

距离.zh: 科技缩小了人们之间的空间距离。
距离.en: Technology has narrowed the spatial distance between people.

距离.zh: 两座城市之间的距离非常遥远。
距离.en: The distance between the two cities is very far.
